videoSnippet.title: This Time No Draws! || Praggnanandhaa vs Anish Giri || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Lotus Chess April Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/nT0JRnZV
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Praggnanandhaa R (2741) - Giri, Anish (2753) 
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [01] 2026.03.29
B23 Sicilian, closed

1.e4 c5 2.Nc3 d6 3.f4 g6 4.Nf3 Bg7 5.Bb5+ Bd7 6.a4 Nc6 7.O-O a6 8.Bc4 e6 9.d3 Nge7 10.f5 exf5 11.Qe1 Be6 12.exf5 gxf5 13.Bxe6 fxe6 14.Qxe6 Qd7 15.Qc4 O-O-O 16.Bg5 Rde8 17.Rae1 Ng6 18.Nd5 Kb8 19.Nf6 Bxf6 20.Bxf6 Rhf8 21.Bc3 f4 22.Rxe8+ Rxe8 23.Re1 Rf8 24.Qe6 Qxe6 25.Rxe6 Kc7 26.Ng5 Kd7 27.Re4 Rf5 28.Nxh7 d5 29.Re2 d4 30.Be1 Nce5 31.Re4 Ng4 32.h3 Ne3 33.c3 Nd5 34.h4 dxc3 35.bxc3 Rh5 36.Ng5 Nf6 37.Re6 Rxg5 38.Rxf6 Rg4 39.h5 Ne5 40.h6 Nf3+ 41.Kf1 Nxe1 42.Kxe1 Rxg2 43.Rxf4 Rh2 44.Rf6 Rh3 45.Kd2 Rh2+ 46.Ke3 Rh3+ 47.Ke4 c4 48.dxc4 Rxc3 49.Kf5 Ke7 50.Rb6 Rxc4 51.h7

01:20 Game Starts
